tasks.command: browser="${ATOM_TEST_WEBDRIVER_BROWSER_PATH:-${ATOM_TEST_WEBDRIVER_FIREFOX_DEV_BINARY:-}}"; if [ -z "$browser" ]; then for candidate in /usr/bin/firefox-developer-edition /usr/bin/firefox-nightly; do if [ -x "$candidate" ]; then browser="$candidate"; break; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$browser" ] || [ ! -x "$browser" ]; then echo "Firefox Developer Edition or Nightly not found. Set ATOM_TEST_WEBDRIVER_BROWSER_PATH to a dev-capable binary."; exit 1; fi; case "$browser" in *nightly*|*Nightly*) browser_name=firefox-nightly ;; *) browser_name=firefox-developer-edition ;; esac; ATOM_TEST_WEBDRIVER_BROWSER="$browser_name" ATOM_TEST_WEBDRIVER_BROWSER_PATH="$browser" ATOM_TEST_WEBDRIVER_HEADLESS="${ATOM_TEST_WEBDRIVER_HEADLESS:-true}" dotnet test --project Tests/Atom.Net.Browsing.WebDriver.Tests/Atom.Net.Browsing.WebDriver.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~RealBrowserLaunchBootstrapsExtensionBackedDiscoverySurface" -p:RunAnalyzers=false -p:EnableNETAnalyzers=false -p:AnalysisMode=None -p:EnforceCodeStyleInBuild=false -p:TreatWarningsAsErrors=false -p:CodeAnalysisTreatWarningsAsErrors=false --output Normal

tasks.command:
find Tests/Atom.Compilers.JavaScript.Tests/bin -path '*BenchmarkDotNet.Artifacts*' -type f \( -name 'Atom.Compilers.JavaScript.Tests.JavaScriptRuntimeParserBenchmarkSuite-*' -o -name 'Atom.Compilers.JavaScript.Tests.JavaScriptRuntimeParserBenchmarks-*' -o -name 'Atom.Compilers.JavaScript.Tests.JavaScriptRuntimeParserBenchmarkSuite-report.*' -o -name 'Atom.Compilers.JavaScript.Tests.JavaScriptRuntimeParserBenchmarks-report.*' \) -delete && ATOM_RUN_BENCHMARKS=1 dotnet test --configuration Release --project Tests/Atom.Compilers.JavaScript.Tests/Atom.Compilers.JavaScript.Tests.csproj /p:UseLocalJavaScriptSourceGenerationAnalyzerReference=true /p:GeneratePackageOnBuild=false -p:RunAnalyzers=false -p:EnforceCodeStyleInBuild=false -p:EnableNETAnalyzers=false -p:AnalysisMode=None --filter "FullyQualifiedName=Atom.Compilers.JavaScript.Tests.JavaScriptRuntimeParserBenchmarks.RunBenchmarks" && printf '
Stable parser benchmark summary:
' && cat Tests/Atom.Compilers.JavaScript.Tests/bin/Release/net10.0/parser-benchmark-summary.txt

tasks.label: shadow frame discovery unit test fixed
shadow frame discovery unit test analyzers off
existing shadow bridge test analyzers off
shadow hosted child frame live test
args:
set -e
cd /run/media/EXOMODE/STUDIO/Works/EscorpDynamics/Labs/Atom
FIREFOX_BIN=""
for candidate in firefox-developer-edition firefox-nightly firefox; do
  if command -v "$candidate" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    FIREFOX_BIN="$(command -v "$candidate")"
    break
  fi
done
test -n "$FIREFOX_BIN"
ATOM_TEST_WEBDRIVER_BROWSER=firefox ATOM_TEST_WEBDRIVER_BROWSER_PATH="$FIREFOX_BIN" ATOM_TEST_WEBDRIVER_HEADLESS=true dotnet test --project Tests/Atom.Net.Browsing.WebDriver.Tests/Atom.Net.Browsing.WebDriver.Tests.csproj -p:RunAnalyzers=false --filter RealBrowserCurrentPageChildIframeObjectModelMaterializesShadowHostedLiveFrameContext

tasks.label: shadow frame discovery live regression cluster
args:
set -e
cd /run/media/EXOMODE/STUDIO/Works/EscorpDynamics/Labs/Atom
FIREFOX_BIN=""
for candidate in firefox-developer-edition firefox-nightly firefox; do
  if command -v "$candidate" >/dev/null 2>&1; then

done

FILTER='FullyQualifiedName~RealBrowserCurrentPageFrameExecutionSurfaceObservesChildIframe|FullyQualifiedName~RealBrowserCurrentPageFrameExecutionSurfaceObservesAboutBlankChildIframe|FullyQualifiedName~RealBrowserCurrentPageFrameExecutionSurfaceObservesIframeHostedInsideShadowRoot|FullyQualifiedName~RealBrowserCurrentPageClosedShadowRootRemainsOpaqueToShadowLookup|FullyQualifiedName~RealBrowserCurrentPageChildIframeObjectModelMaterializesLiveFrameContext|FullyQualifiedName~RealBrowserCurrentPageChildIframeObjectModelMaterializesShadowHostedLiveFrameContext|FullyQualifiedName~RealBrowserCurrentPageChildIframeObjectModelTreatsCrossOriginFrameAsOpaqueContext'
